Title: Touch Target Size Below Medical Device Recommendation
Description: Button height is 36px, below 44px recommended for medical device touch targets
StepsToReproduce: 1. Review CoreTokens.xaml 2. Check button height specifications 3. Compare to IEC 62366 guidelines
Recommendation: Use Large (44px) as default for medical device safety

Title: Visual Regression Tests Require UI Automation
Description: Screenshot comparison tests cannot run without UI automation framework
StepsToReproduce: 1. Set up FlaUI or similar 2. Implement screenshot capture 3. Run comparison tests

Title: Performance Tests Require Runtime Metrics
Description: Actual load time metrics require runtime instrumentation
StepsToReproduce: 1. Add performance counters 2. Run application under profiler 3. Collect metrics
